description:
First extraction wedge. Move the simplest, most self-contained FFI cluster from ir_codegen.rs to a new src/ir_runtime.rs:

  - fz_arith_{add,sub,mul,div,mod}
  - fz_cmp_{lt,le,gt,ge}
  - fz_value_eq
  - Helpers: fz_to_f64, box_float, cmp_to_fz, eq_fz, eq_list,
    eq_struct, eq_bitstring, eq_map, fz_key_category, fz_key_cmp

These have minimal cross-coupling to the rest of ir_codegen (no render_*, no Process scheduler fields beyond what's already pub or pub(crate)).

ir_codegen continues to reference them via `crate::ir_runtime::fz_*` in the symbol-binding list. No semantic change.

Other FFI clusters land in sibling tickets (alloc, map, bs, vec, closure, spawn/send/receive, print, halt).

## Acceptance

- cargo test green.
- ir_codegen.rs no longer defines these fns.
- src/ir_runtime.rs exists and is mod-declared in main.rs.
title: Extract arith/cmp/eq FFI cluster from ir_codegen.rs
